arts.ttl: BFW Analysis: Crafting a consistent system for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: This first shape is what the team inhabits against opposition that like to build-up with a 2-3 structure, which is to say, two outfield players as the first line with a line of three just ahead of them (in this case, two centre-backs, a single midfielder dropped deep and the full-backs). Every single player in passing range is marked, meaning the full-back has no option but to dribble it out or somehow find the players on the opposite side of the pitch by looping it over the entire team — something that still requires getting past Olise and Kimmich who are not tied down to a man and are free to intercept the pass without breaking structure.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich stresses the importance of support within the club
arts.sum: In his postgame interview with Maximilian Koch, Kimmich simply said, “It’s always nice when the club is behind you.” Kimmich went on to deflect the attention toward substitutes Sané and Goretzka.

arts.ttl: Uh-oh...Bayern Munich star Manuel Neuer not in team training
arts.sum: Not all hope is lost, however, as Bayern Munich plans to face Werder Bremen. Instead, Neuer worked out individually inside the training facility with hopes of returning to team practice on Friday:
